To eat these can be beneficial if. You just take them right before a meal because they are so short acting." Hunter (2026-04-30, these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158 16:14, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158/): "We've go GHRP2, GHRP6. Let's swap with IPPA and CJC."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter (2026-04-30, these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158 7:01, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158/): "GHRP6 can cause ravenous near uncontrollable hunger within 15 to 20 minutes of injection, which is obviously counterproductive to us that are trying to maintain body composition."
- Hunter (2026-04-30, these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158 7:01, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158/): "It also significantly elevates prolactin and cortisol."
- Hunter (2026-04-30, these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158 7:01, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/these-peptides-are-overrated-heres-what-actually-works--90479158/): "both ghrelin receptor desensitization with chronic use requires dose escalation over time"; Hunter (2026-04-07, ODWpYYPTB_8 00:07:29.360, https://youtu.be/ODWpYYPTB_8): "and both ghrelin receptor desensitization with chronic use"; Hunter (2026-04-07, ODWpYYPTB_8 00:07:31.560, https://youtu.be/ODWpYYPTB_8): "uh, requires dose escalation over time, which is again a fundamental design flaw in those."
- Taylor (2026-01-17, 5ugqlYRSRSo 01:12:10.719, https://youtu.be/5ugqlYRSRSo): "too, you have to be careful with those, the prolactin and cortisol."
- Hunter (2026-03-30, ghrh-vs-ghrp-how-to-stack-growth-hormone-peptides--2bcd2680 22:32, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/ghrh-vs-ghrp-how-to-stack-growth-hormone-peptides--2bcd2680/): "don't stack GHRPs Together."
